title: VECTOR
body:
# VECTOR
*Minecraft Retro-computing*

Did you own an IBM PC? Or maybe you had an Apple II? This is how Minecraft might have looked on it.
In the same vein as [Epoch](https://modrinth.com/shader/epoch), VECTOR allows you to pretend like it's the 1980s.

### Features
- Line graphics
- CRT distortion
- Monochrome
- HUD (Iris only)
